title: LM Better Achievements
description: More and Better achievements for Minecraft!
body:
LM Better Achievements is an Minecraft Java mod that adds nw advancements to the game to add more fun! LM Better Achievements in an official mod from the LM Mods collection.


Here are some of the advancements:
1. Where is my wool?
2. Fireproof
3. First Step
4. Tree Hugger

Version 2026.1 is the best working version till now.
Betá versions need _ViaFabricPlus_ from **1.21.8-1.21.11**
